Methods

| Methods | RT Professional | RT Advanced | Panel RT | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Activate](#activate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Enables the permanent area or the root screen. |
| [ActivateDynamic](#activatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Dynamically activates a trigger and the specified cycle for a property at runtime. |
| [AttachDB](#attachdb-method-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Connect backup" key function of the control. |
| [CalculateStatistic](#calculatestatistic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Calculate statistics" key function of the f(t) trend view and the table view. |
| [CopyRows](#copyrows-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Copy lines" key function of the control. |
| [DeactivateDynamic](#deactivatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Deactivates the trigger of the "ActivateDynamic" method used for the specified property in/during runtime. |
| [DetachDB](#detachdb-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Disconnect backup" key function of the control. |
| [Edit](#edit-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Edit" key function of the table view. |
| [Export](#export-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Export log" or "Export data" key function of the control. |
| [GetOperatorMessage](#getoperatormessage-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the operator message object of the alarm view designated by name or index as "ICCAxOperatorMessage" type. |
| GetOperatorMessageCollection | Yes | - | - | - |
| [GetRow](#getrow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the row object designated by its row number in the table-based controls as "ICCAxDataRow" type. |
| [GetRowCollection](#getrowcollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all row objects of the table-based controls as "ICCAxDataRowCollection" type. |
| [GetSelectedRow](#getselectedrow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the selected row object of a table-based control as "ICCAxDataRow" type. |
| [GetSelectedRows](#getselectedrows-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the selected row objects of a table-based control as type "ICCAxDataRow" for multiple selection. |
| [GetStatusbarElement](#getstatusbarelement-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the element of the control status bar designated by name or index as "ICCAxStatusbarElement" type. |
| [GetStatusbarElementCollection](#getstatusbarelementcollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all status bar elements of the control as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetTimeColumn](#gettimecolumn-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the time column object of the table view designated by name or index as "ICCAxTimeColumn" type. |
| [GetTimeColumnCollection](#gettimecolumncollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all time column objects of the table view as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetToolbarButton](#gettoolbarbutton-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the control toolbar button function designated by name or index as "ICCAxToolbarButton" type. |
| [GetToolbarButtonCollection](#gettoolbarbuttoncollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all button functions of the control toolbar as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetValueColumn](#getvaluecolumn-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the value column object of the f(t) trend view designated by name or index as "ICCAxValueColumn" type. |
| [GetValueColumnCollection](#getvaluecolumncollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all value column objects of the f(t) trend view as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [MoveToFirst](#movetofirst-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "First line" button function of the control. |
| [MoveToLast](#movetolast-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Last data record" button function of the control. |
| [MoveToNext](#movetonext-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Next data record" button function of the control. |
| [MoveToPrevious](#movetoprevious-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Previous data record" button function of the control. |
| [NextColumn](#nextcolumn-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Next column" button function of the table view. |
| [PreviousColumn](#previouscolumn-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Previous column" button function of the table view. |
| [Print](#print-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Print" button function of the control. |
| [SelectAll](#selectall-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Selects all rows in a table-based control. |
| [SelectRow](#selectrow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Selects a specific row in a table-based control. |
| [SelectStatisticArea](#selectedstatisticarea-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Set statistics range" button function of the table view. |
| [ShowColumnSelection](#showcolumnselection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Select columns" button function of the table view. |
| [ShowHelp](#showhelp-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Help" button function of the control. |
| ShowInsertValueDialog | Yes | - | - | - |
| [ShowPropertyDialog](#showpropertydialog-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Configuration dialog" button function of the control. |
| [ShowTagSelection](#showtagselection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Select data connection" button function of the control. |
| [ShowTimeSelection](#showtimeselection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Select time range" button function of the control. |
| [StartStopUpdate](#startstopupdate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Start" or "Stop" button function of the control. |
| [UnselectAll](#unselectall-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Removes all selections from the cells of a table-based control. |
| [UnselectRow](#unselectrow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Removes the selections from a specific cell of a table-based control. |

#### OnlineTrendControl (Panels, Comfort Panels, RT Advanced, RT Professional)

##### Description

![Description](images/36126536203_DV_resource.Stream@PNG-de-DE.png)

Represents the "f(t) TrendView" object. The OnlineTrendControl object is an element of the ScreenItems list.

##### Type identifier in VBS

HMIOnlineTrendControl

| Abbreviation | Access in Runtime |
| --- | --- |
| R | Read |
| RW | Read and write |
| - | No access |

| [TrendRepos](#trendrepos-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the position of a trend referenced with "TrendIndex" in the trend window of the object. |
| Trends | - | - | - | - |
| [TrendSelectTagName](#trendselecttagname-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies that the dialog for selecting the tag name for the data source of the value axis is displayed initially in runtime. |
| [TrendTagName](#trendtagname-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the name of the tag that supplies the value axis with data. |
| [TrendTimeAxis](#trendtimeaxis-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the time axis to be used for the selected trend. |
| [TrendTrendWindow](#trendtrendwindow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the trend window in which the selected trend is shown. |
| [TrendUncertainColor](#trenduncertaincolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color for values of uncertain status. |
| [TrendUncertainColoring](#trenduncertaincoloring-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies that values of uncertain status are to be highlighted. |
| [TrendUpperLimit](#trendupperlimit-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the high limit of a tag that is displayed in the specified object as a trend. |
| [TrendUpperLimitColor](#trendupperlimitcolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color that marks trend values which are above the value of "TrendUpperLimit". |
| [TrendUpperLimitColoring](#trendupperlimitcoloring-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the selection frame is shown with the color defined by the system. |
| TrendValueAlign | - | - | - | - |
| [TrendValueAxis](#trendvalueaxis-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the value axis that is used for the trend selected. |
| [TrendValueUnit](#trendvalueunit-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | For the trend type "Display values", specifies a unit for the values that is then attached to the values to be displayed, e.g. "%" or "°C". |
| [TrendVisible](#trendvisible-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the trend referenced with ""TrendIndex" is displayed in the object. |
| [TrendWindowAdd](#trendwindowadd-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Creates a new trend view. |
| [TrendWindowCoarseGrid](#trendwindowcoarsegrid-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies if the grid lines for the main scale are displayed. |
| [TrendWindowCoarseGridColor](#trendwindowcoarsegridcolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the main grid for the referenced diagram in the object. |
| [TrendWindowCount](#trendwindowcount-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the number of configured trend diagrams in the trend view. |
| [TrendWindowFineGrid](#trendwindowfinegrid-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether grid lines are displayed for the secondary scaling. |
| [TrendWindowFineGridColor](#trendwindowfinegridcolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the secondary grid for the referenced diagram in the object. |
| [TrendWindowForegroundTrendGrid](#trendwindowforegroundtrendgrid-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether only the grid lines for the foreground trend are displayed in the selected trend window. |
| [TrendWindowGridInTrendColor](#trendwindowgridintrendcolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the grid lines for the main scaling are displayed in the trend color. |
| [TrendWindowHorizontalGrid](#trendwindowhorizontalgrid-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the horizontal grid lines are shown. |
| [TrendWindowIndex](#trendwindowindex-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | References a trend view. To access the properties of a trend view, you need to set "TrendWindowIndex". |
| [TrendWindowName](#trendwindowname-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the name of a trend view referenced with "TrendWindowIndex". |
| [TrendWindowRemove](#trendwindowremove-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Removes a trend view referenced with its name. |
| [TrendWindowRename](#trendwindowrename-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the new name of a trend view referenced with "TrendWindowIndex". |
| [TrendWindowRepos](#trendwindowrepos-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the position of a trend view referenced with "TrendWindowIndex". |
| [TrendWindowRulerColor](#trendwindowrulercolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the ruler. |
| [TrendWindowRulerLayer](#trendwindowrulerlayer-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the display layer of the ruler in the trend view. |
| [TrendWindowRulerStyle](#trendwindowrulerstyle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the appearance of the ruler. |
| [TrendWindowRulerWidth](#trendwindowrulerwidth-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the thickness of the ruler in pixels. |
| TrendWindows | - | - | - | - |
| [TrendWindowSpacePortion](#trendwindowspaceportion-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the range proportion of the referenced diagram in the diagram area of the object. |
| [TrendWindowStatisticRulerColor](#trendwindowstatisticrulercolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the statistics ruler. |
| [TrendWindowStatisticRulerStyle](#trendwindowstatisticrulerstyle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Defines the graphical configurability of the lines for specifying the statistics area in the trend window. |
| [TrendWindowStatisticRulerWidth](#trendwindowstatisticrulerwidth-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the line thickness of the statistics ruler. |
| [TrendWindowVerticalGrid](#trendwindowverticalgrid-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the vertical grid lines are displayed. |
| [TrendWindowVisible](#trendwindowvisible-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the trend view referenced with "TrendWindowIndex" is displayed. |
| [UseTrendNameAsLabel](#usetrendnameaslabel-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the "Name" or "Label" property is used as a designation for the trend in runtime. |
| ValueAxes | - | - | - | - |
| [ValueAxisAdd](#valueaxisadd-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Creates a new value axis. |
| [ValueAxisAlignment](#valueaxisalignment-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the alignment of the value axis. |
| [ValueAxisAutoPrecisions](#valueaxisautoprecisions-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the number of decimal places for a value axis referenced with "ValueAxisIndex" is set automatically. |
| [ValueAxisAutoRange](#valueaxisautorange-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the value range of a value axis referenced with "ValueAxisIndex" is calculated automatically. |
| [ValueAxisBeginValue](#valueaxisbeginvalue-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the lower end of the value range of a value axis referenced with "ValueAxisIndex". |
| [ValueAxisColor](#valueaxiscolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of a value axis. |
| [ValueAxisCount](#valueaxiscount-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the number of configured value axes. |
| [ValueAxisEndValue](#valueaxisendvalue-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the upper end of the value range of a value axis referenced with "ValueAxisIndex". |
| [ValueAxisExponentialFormat](#valueaxisexponentialformat-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the values of a value axis referenced with "ValueAxisIndex" are displayed in exponential notation. |
| [ValueAxisIndex](#valueaxisindex-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | References a value axis. |
| [ValueAxisInTrendColor](#valueaxisintrendcolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the color of the axis referenced with "ValueAxisIndex" corresponds to the trend color. |
| [ValueAxisLabel](#valueaxislabel-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Defines the label text for a value axis referenced with "ValueAxisIndex". |
| [ValueAxisName](#valueaxisname-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the name of a value axis referenced with "ValueAxisIndex". |
| [ValueAxisPrecisions](#valueaxisprecisions-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the number of displayed decimal places. |
| [ValueAxisRemove](#valueaxisremove-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Removes a value axis referenced with its name. |
| [ValueAxisRename](#valueaxisrename-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the new name of a value axis referenced with "ValueAxisIndex". |
| [ValueAxisRepos](#valueaxisrepos-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the position of a value axis referenced with "ValueAxisIndex". |
| [ValueAxisScalingType](#valueaxisscalingtype-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the type of scaling for the value axis referenced with "ValueAxisIndex". |
| [ValueAxisTrendWindow](#valueaxistrendwindow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the trend diagram in which the axis referenced with "ValueAxisIndex" is displayed. |
| [ValueAxisVisible](#valueaxisvisible-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the value axis referenced with "ValueAxisIndex" is displayed in the object. |
| [Visible](#visible-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the selected object is visible. |
| [Width](#width-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the width of the object in pixels. |

Methods

| Methods | RT Professional | RT Advanced | Panel RT | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Activate](#activate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Enables the permanent area or the root screen. |
| [ActivateDynamic](#activatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Dynamically activates a trigger and the specified cycle for a property at runtime. |
| [AttachDB](#attachdb-method-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Connect backup" key function of the control. |
| [CalculateStatistic](#calculatestatistic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Calculate statistics" key function of the f(t) trend view and the table view. |
| [DeactivateDynamic](#deactivatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Deactivates the trigger of the "ActivateDynamic" method used for the specified property in/during runtime. |
| [DetachDB](#detachdb-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Disconnect backup" key function of the control. |
| [Export](#export-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Export log" or "Export data" key function of the control. |
| [GetRulerData](#getrulerdata-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the value of the called trend at the ruler position. |
| [GetStatusbarElement](#getstatusbarelement-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the element of the control status bar designated by name or index as "ICCAxStatusbarElement" type. |
| [GetStatusbarElementCollection](#gettimecolumncollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all status bar elements of the control as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetTimeAxis](#gettimeaxis-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the f(t) trend view time axis object that is specified by name or index as "ICCAxTimeAxis" type. |
| [GetTimeAxisCollection](#gettimeaxiscollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns a list of all f(t) trend view time axis objects as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetToolbarButton](#gettoolbarbutton-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the control toolbar button function designated by name or index as "ICCAxToolbarButton" type. |
| [GetToolbarButtonCollection](#gettoolbarbuttoncollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all button functions of the control toolbar as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetTrend](#gettrend-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the f(t) or f(x) trend view trend designated by name or index as "ICCAxTrend" or "ICCAxFunctionTrend" type. |
| [GetTrendCollection](#gettrendcollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all trends of the f(t) or f(x) trend view as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetTrendWindow](#gettrendwindow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the trend window object of the f(t) or f(x) trend view designated by name or index as "ICCAxTrendWindow" type. |
| [GetTrendWindowCollection](#gettrendwindowcollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all trend window objects of the f(t) or f(x) trend views as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetValueAxis](#getvalueaxis-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the f(t) trend view value axis object that is specified by name or index as "ICCAxValueAxis" type. |
| [GetValueAxisCollection](#getvalueaxiscollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns a list of all f(t) trend view value axis objects as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [MoveAxis](#moveaxis-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Move axes area" button function of the f(t) and f(x) trend views. |
| MoveRuler | Yes | - | - |  |
| [MoveToFirst](#movetofirst-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "First line" button function of the control. |
| [MoveToLast](#movetolast-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Last data record" button function of the control. |
| [MoveToNext](#movetonext-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Next data record" button function of the control. |
| [MoveToPrevious](#movetoprevious-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Previous data record" button function of the control. |
| [NextTrend](#nexttrend-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Next trend" button function of the f(t) and f(x) trend views. |
| [OneToOneView](#onetooneview-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Original view" button function of the f(t) and f(x) trend views. |
| [PreviousTrend](#previoustrend-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Previous trend" button function of the f(t) and f(x) trend views. |
| [Print](#print-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Print" button function of the control. |
| [ShowHelp](#showhelp-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Help" button function of the control. |
| [ShowPercentageAxis](#showpercentageaxis-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Relative axis" button function of the f(t) trend view. |
| [ShowPropertyDialog](#showpropertydialog-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Configuration dialog" button function of the control. |
| [ShowTagSelection](#showtagselection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Select data connection" button function of the control. |
| [ShowTimeSelection](#showtimeselection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Select time range" button function of the control. |
| [ZoomArea](#zoomarea-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Zoom area" button function of the f(t) and f(x) trend views. |
| [ZoomInOut](#zoominout-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Zoom +/-" button function of the f(t) and f(x) trend views. |
| [ZoomInOutTime](#zoominouttime-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Zoom time axis +/-" button function of the f(t) trend view. |
| [ZoomInOutValues](#zoominoutvalues-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Zoom value axis +/-" button function of the f(t) trend view. |
| [ZoomMove](#zoommove-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Move trend area" button function of the f(t) and f(x) trend views. |

#### OptionGroup (Panels, Comfort Panels, RT Advanced, RT Professional)

##### Description

![Description](images/36126536203_DV_resource.Stream@PNG-de-DE.png)

Represents the "Option button" object. The OptionGroup object is an element of the ScreenItems list.

##### Type identifier in VBS

HMIOptionGroup

| Abbreviation | Access in Runtime |
| --- | --- |
| R | Read |
| RW | Read and write |
| - | No access |

Properties

| Properties | RT Professional | RT Advanced | Panel RT | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [AdaptBorder](#adaptborder-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the border of the object will be dynamically adapted to the text size. |
| AllTagTypesAllowed | - | - | - | - |
| [Authorization](#authorization-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies operating rights. |
| [BackColor](#backcolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the background color. |
| [BackFillStyle](#backfillstyle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the fill pattern. |
| [BackFlashingColorOff](#backflashingcoloroff-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the background color for flash state "Off". |
| [BackFlashingColorOn](#backflashingcoloron-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the background color for flash state "On". |
| [BackFlashingEnabled](#backflashingenabled-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the background flashes in runtime. |
| [BackFlashingRate](#backflashingrate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the flash rate of the background. |
| [BorderBackColor](#borderbackcolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the background color of the broken border line. |
| [BorderColor](#bordercolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the line color. |
| [BorderFlashingColorOff](#borderflashingcoloroff-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the border line for the flashing status "Off". |
| [BorderFlashingColorOn](#borderflashingcoloron-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the border line for the flashing status "On". |
| [BorderFlashingEnabled](#borderflashingenabled-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the limit of the object can flash in runtime. |
| [BorderFlashingRate](#borderflashingrate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the flash rate of the border line. |
| BorderStyle | - | - | - | - |
| [BorderWidth](#borderwidth-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the line thickness. |
| Bounds | - | - | - | - |
| CanBeGrouped | - | - | - | - |
| [CheckMarkAlignment](#checkmarkalignment-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the fields are right-aligned. |
| [CheckMarkCount](#checkmarkcount-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the number of fields. |
| [CornerStyle](#cornerstyle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the shape of the corners. |
| [DrawInsideFrame](#drawinsideframe-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the border line is to be shown with a line thickness of greater than 1 within the border or symmetrically to the border. |
| [EdgeStyle](#edgestyle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the line style. |
| [Enabled](#enabled-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the selected object can be operated in runtime. |
| [FillingDirection](#fillingdirection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the fill direction. |
| [FillPatternColor](#fillpatterncolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the fill pattern. |
| Flashing | - | - | - | - |
| [FlashingColorOff](#flashingcoloroff-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the border line for the flashing status "Off". |
| [FlashingColorOn](#flashingcoloron-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the border line for the flashing status "On". |
| [FlashingEnabled](#flashingenabled-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether flashing is activated for the object in runtime. |
| [FlashingRate](#flashingrate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the flash rate of the border line. |
| Font | - | - | - | - |
| [FontBold](#fontbold-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the text is shown in bold. |
| [FontItalic](#fontitalic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the text is shown in italics. |
| [FontName](#fontname-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the font. |
| [FontSize](#fontsize-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the font size of the text. |
| [FontUnderline](#fontunderline-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the text is shown underlined. |
| [ForeColor](#forecolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the font color of the text. |
| [Height](#height-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the height. |
| [HorizontalAlignment](#horizontalalignment-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the horizontal alignment of the text. |
| [Index](#index-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the index for the selected text field. |
| [Layer](#layer-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the layer in the screen that contains an object. |
| [Left](#left-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the value of the X coordinate. |
| [LineEndShapeStyle](#lineendshapestyle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the shape of the line ends. |
| Location | - | - | - | - |
| [LogOperation](#logoperation-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether, after operating this object, an alarm is output to the alarm system. |
| Name | - | - | - | - |
| [ProcessValue](#processvalue-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the default for the value to be displayed. |
| [RelativeFillLevel](#relativefilllevel-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the fill percentage for the object. |
| [ShowBadTagState](#showbadtagstate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Defines whether the object is grayed out when a bad quality code or tag status is detected. |
| [ShowFillLevel](#showfilllevel-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the selected object is filled. |
| Size | - | - | - | - |
| TabIndex | - | - | - | - |
| TabIndexAlpha | - | - | - | - |
| [Text](#text-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the label for the text field. |
| TextHandles | - | - | - | - |
| [TextOrientation](#textorientation-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the text orientation. |
| Texts | - | - | - | - |
| [ToolTipText](#tooltiptext-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the tooltip text. |

#### RecipeView (Panels, Comfort Panels, RT Advanced)

##### Description

![Description](images/36126536203_DV_resource.Stream@PNG-de-DE.png)

Displays the "Recipe view" object. The RecipeView object is an element of the ScreenItems list.

If you change the settings for this object with a user-defined function, the changed settings are retained even after the screen is called again.

> **Note**
>
> The object "Simple RecipeView" cannot be dynamized with a user-defined function.

| [FlashingEnabled](#flashingenabled-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the border line of the selected object flashes in runtime. |
| [FlashingRate](#flashingrate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the flash rate of the border line for the selected object. |
| Font | - | - | - | - |
| [FontBold](#fontbold-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the text of the selected object is shown in bold. |
| [FontItalic](#fontitalic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the text of the selected object is shown in italics. |
| [FontName](#fontname-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the font of the selected object. |
| [FontSize](#fontsize-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the font size of the text for the selected object. |
| [FontUnderline](#fontunderline-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the text of the selected object is underlined. |
| [ForeColor](#forecolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Specifies the font color of the text for the selected object. |
| [Height](#height-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Specifies the height of the selected object. |
| [HorizontalAlignment](#horizontalalignment-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Specifies the horizontal alignment of the text within the selected object. |
| [Layer](#layer-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the layer in the screen in which an object is located. |
| [Left](#left-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the value of the X coordinate of the object. |
| [LineEndShapeStyle](#lineendshapestyle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Specifies the shape of the line ends. |
| Location | - | - | - | - |
| [Mode](#mode-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the field type of the specified object. |
| Name | - | - | - | - |
| [PictureAlignment](#picturealignment-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the display type for the background screen in the process image. |
| [PictureDeactivated](#picturedeactivated-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the graphic that is displayed in the "Disabled" state. |
| [PictureOff](#pictureoff-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the graphic that is displayed in the "Off" state. |
| [PictureOn](#pictureon-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the screen that is displayed in the "On" state. |
| [Pressed](#pressed-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the specified object is displayed as pressed. |
| [Radius](#radius-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the radius of the specified "Circle" object. |
| [RelativeFillLevel](#relativefilllevel-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the percentage to which the object is filled. |
| [ShowFillLevel](#showfilllevel-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the specified object is filled. |
| Size | - | - | - | - |
| [StyleSettings](#stylesettings-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the style in which the object is displayed. |
| TabIndex | - | - | - | - |
| TabIndexAlpha | - | - | - | - |
| [Text](#text-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the label for the text field. |
| [TextOrientation](#textorientation-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the text orientation of the specified object. |
| [Toggle](#toggle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the specified object engages after it has been operated in Runtime. |
| [ToolTipText](#tooltiptext-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the tooltip text. |
| [Top](#top-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the value of the Y coordinate of the object. |
| [Transparency](#transparency-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the object transparency in percent. |
| [TransparentColorDeactivatedPicture](#transparentcolordeactivatedpicture-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the color of the assigned bitmap object to be set to "transparent" for the "Disabled" state. |
| [TransparentColorPictureOff](#transparentcolorpictureoff-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the color of the assigned bitmap object to be set to "transparent" for the "Off" state. |
| [TransparentColorPictureOn](#transparentcolorpictureon-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the color of the assigned bitmap object to be set to "transparent" for the "On" state. |
| [UseDesignColorSchema](#usedesigncolorschema-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the colors defined in the global color scheme of the current design are used for this object. |
| [UseDesignShadowSettings](#usedesignshadowsettings-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the object is displayed with the shading defined in the active design. |
| [UseTransparentColorDeactivatedPicture](#usetransparentcolordeactivatedpicture-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the transparent color specified with the "TransparentColorDeactivatedPicture" property is used for the "Disabled" state. |
| [UseTransparentColorPictureOff](#usetransparentcolorpictureoff-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the transparent color defined with the property "TransparentColorPictureOff" is used for the "Off" state. |
| [UseTransparentColorPictureOn](#usetransparentcolorpictureon-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the transparent color defined with the property "TransparentColorPictureOn" is used for the "On" state. |
| [VerticalAlignment](#verticalalignment-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the vertical alignment of the text of the specified object. |
| [Visible](#visible-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the specified object is visible. |
| [Width](#width-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the width of the object in pixels. |

Methods

| Methods | RT Professional | RT Advanced | Panel RT | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Activate](#activate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | Yes | Yes | Enables the permanent area or the root screen. |
| [ActivateDynamic](#activatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Dynamically activates a trigger and the specified cycle for a property at runtime. |
| [DeactivateDynamic](#deactivatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Deactivates the trigger of the "ActivateDynamic" method used for the specified property in/during runtime. |

| [WindowOnTop](#windowontop-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Specifies whether the object always remains in the foreground in Runtime. |
| [WindowSizingEnabled](#windowsizingenabled-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Specifies whether the size can be changed. |
| [WindowStartupPosition](#windowstartupposition-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Specifies the position and the mode of the screen window when an independent screen window is configured. |
| [ZoomFactor](#zoomfactor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the zoom factor of a screen or screen window. |

| Methods | RT Professional | RT Advanced | Panel RT | Description |

| [ActivateDynamic](#activatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Dynamically activates a trigger and the specified cycle for a property at runtime. |
| [DeactivateDynamic](#deactivatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Deactivates the trigger of the "ActivateDynamic" method used for the specified property in/during runtime. |

Methods

| Methods | RT Professional | RT Advanced | Panel RT | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Activate](#activate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | Yes | Yes | Enables the permanent area or the root screen. |
| [ActivateDynamic](#activatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Dynamically activates a trigger and the specified cycle for a property at runtime. |
| [DeactivateDynamic](#deactivatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Deactivates the trigger of the "ActivateDynamic" method used for the specified property in/during runtime. |

![Description](images/36126536203_DV_resource.Stream@PNG-de-DE.png)

Represents the "TextField" object. The TextField object is an element of the ScreenItems list.

HMITextField

| Abbreviation | Access in runtime |
| --- | --- |

| RW | Read and write |

Methods

| Methods | RT Professional | RT Advanced | Panel RT | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Activate](#activate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | Yes | Yes | Enables the permanent area or the root screen. |
| [ActivateDynamic](#activatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Dynamically activates a trigger and the specified cycle for a property at runtime. |
| [DeactivateDynamic](#deactivatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Deactivates the trigger of the "ActivateDynamic" method used for the specified property in/during runtime. |

#### TrendRulerControl (Panels, Comfort Panels, RT Advanced, RT Professional)

##### Description

![Description](images/36127474571_DV_resource.Stream@PNG-de-DE.png)

Represents the "Value table" object. The TrendRulerControl object is an element of the ScreenItems list.

##### Type identifier in VBS

HMITrendRulerControl

##### Example

In the following example, the object with the name "Control1" is moved 16 pixels to the right:

'VBS60

Dim objControl

Set objControl = ScreenItems("Control1")

objControl.Left = objControl.Left + 16

| Abbreviation | Access in Runtime |
| --- | --- |
| R | Read |
| RW | Read and write |
| - | No access |

| Properties | RT Professional | RT Advanced | Panel RT | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| AllTagTypesAllowed | - | - | - | - |
| ApplyProjectSettingsForDesignMode | - | - | - | - |
| [AutoCompleteColumns](#autocompletecolumns-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether empty columns are shown if the control is wider than the configured columns. |
| [AutoCompleteRows](#autocompleterows-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether empty rows are shown if the control is longer than the number of configured rows. |

Methods

| Methods | RT Professional | RT Advanced | Panel RT | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Activate](#activate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Enables the permanent area or the root screen. |
| [ActivateDynamic](#activatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Dynamically activates a trigger and the specified cycle for a property at runtime. |
| [DeactivateDynamic](#deactivatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Deactivates the trigger of the "ActivateDynamic" method used for the specified property in/during runtime. |
| [Export](#export-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Export log" or "Export data" key function of the control. |
| [GetRow](#getrow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the row object designated by its row number in the table-based controls as "ICCAxDataRow" type. |
| [GetRowCollection](#getrowcollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all row objects of the table-based controls as "ICCAxDataRowCollection" type. |
| [GetRulerBlock](#getrulerblock-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the block object of the evaluation table designated by name or index as "ICCAxRulerBlock" type. |
| [GetRulerBlockCollection](#getrulerblockcollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all block objects of the evaluation table as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetRulerColumn](#getrulercolumn-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the column object of the evaluation table designated by name or index as "ICCAxRulerColumn" type. |
| [GetRulerColumnCollection](#getrulercolumncollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all column objects of the evaluation table as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetSelectedRow](#getselectedrow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the selected row object of a table-based control as "ICCAxDataRow" type. |
| [GetSelectedRows](#getselectedrows-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the selected row objects of a table-based control as type "ICCAxDataRow" for multiple selection. |
| [GetStatisticAreaColumn](#getstatisticareacolumn-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the column object of the statistics area window of the evaluation table designated by name or index as "ICCAxRulerColumn" type. |
| [GetStatisticAreaColumnCollection](#getstatisticareacolumncollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all column objects of the statistics area window of the evaluation table as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetStatisticResultColumn](#getstatisticresultcolumn-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the column object of the statistics window of the evaluation table designated by name or index as "ICCAxRulerColumn" type. |
| [GetStatisticResultColumnCollection](#getstatisticresultcolumncollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all column objects of the statistics window of the evaluation table as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetStatusbarElement](#getstatusbarelement-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the element of the control status bar designated by name or index as "ICCAxStatusbarElement" type. |
| [GetStatusbarElementCollection](#getstatusbarelementcollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all status bar elements of the control as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetToolbarButton](#gettoolbarbutton-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the control toolbar button function designated by name or index as "ICCAxToolbarButton" type. |
| [GetToolbarButtonCollection](#gettoolbarbuttoncollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all button functions of the control toolbar as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [Print](#print-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Print" button function of the control. |
| [SelectAll](#selectall-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Selects all rows in a table-based control. |
| [SelectRow](#selectrow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Selects a specific row in a table-based control. |
| [ShowHelp](#showhelp-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Help" button function of the control. |
| [ShowPropertyDialog](#showpropertydialog-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Configuration dialog" button function of the control. |
| [UnselectAll](#unselectall-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Removes all selections from the cells of a table-based control. |
| [UnselectRow](#unselectrow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Removes the selections from a specific cell of a table-based control. |

#### TrendView (Panels, Comfort Panels, RT Advanced)

##### Description

![Description](images/36126536203_DV_resource.Stream@PNG-de-DE.png)

Represents the "TrendView" object. The TrendView object is an element of the ScreenItems list.

##### Type identifier in VBS

HMITrendView

| Abbreviation | Access in runtime |
| --- | --- |
| R | Read |
| RW | Read and write |
| - | No access |

#### TubeArcObject (Panels, Comfort Panels, RT Advanced, RT Professional)

##### Description

![Description](images/36126536203_DV_resource.Stream@PNG-de-DE.png)

Represents the "TubeArc" object. The TubeArcObject is an element of the ScreenItems list.

##### Type identifier in VBS

HMITubeArcObject

##### Application

In the following example, the object with the name "TubeArcObject1" is moved 10 pixels to the right:

'VBS24

Dim objTubeArcObject

Set objTubeArcObject = ScreenItems("TubeArcObject1")

objTubeArcObject.Left = objTubeArcObject.Left + 10

| Abbreviation | Access in runtime |
| --- | --- |
| R | Read |
| RW | Read and write |
| - | No access |

| LineEndShapeStyle | - | - | - | - |
| [LineWidth](#linewidth-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the line thickness. |

| [Top](#top-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the value of the Y coordinate. |
| [UseSelectedTitleColor](#useselectedtitlecolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether a selection color is used for the headers of selected table cells. |
| [UseTableColor2](#usetablecolor2-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether a second row color is used for the representation of the table. |
| [VerticalGridLines](#verticalgridlines-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether vertical separation lines are displayed. |
| [Visible](#visible-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the selected object is visible. |
| [Width](#width-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the width of the object in pixels. |

Methods

| Methods | RT Professional | RT Advanced | Panel RT | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Activate](#activate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Enables the permanent area or the root screen. |
| [ActivateDynamic](#activatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Dynamically activates a trigger and the specified cycle for a property with VBScript during runtime. |
| [CopyRows](#copyrows-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Copy lines" key function of the control. |
| [CutRows](#cutrows-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Cut rows" key function of the recipe view. |
| [DeactivateDynamic](#deactivatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Deactivates the trigger of the "ActivateDynamic" method used for the specified property in/during runtime. |
| [DeleteRows](#deleterows-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Delete rows" key function of the recipe view. |
| [Export](#export-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Export log" or "Export data" key function of the control. |
| [GetColumn](#getcolumn-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the column object of the recipe view designated by name or index as "ICCAxUAColumn" type. |
| [GetColumnCollection](#getcolumncollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all column objects of the recipe view as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetRow](#getrow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the row object designated by its row number in the table-based controls as "ICCAxDataRow" type. |
| [GetRowCollection](#getrowcollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all row objects of the table-based controls as "ICCAxDataRowCollection" type. |
| [GetSelectedRow](#getselectedrow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the selected row object of a table-based control as "ICCAxDataRow" type. |
| [GetSelectedRows](#getselectedrows-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the selected row objects of a table-based control as type "ICCAxDataRow" for multiple selection. |
| [GetStatusbarElement](#getstatusbarelement-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the element of the control status bar designated by name or index as "ICCAxStatusbarElement" type. |
| [GetStatusbarElementCollection](#getstatusbarelementcollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all status bar elements of the control as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [GetToolbarButton](#gettoolbarbutton-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the control toolbar button function designated by name or index as "ICCAxToolbarButton" type. |
| [GetToolbarButtonCollection](#gettoolbarbuttoncollection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Returns the list of all button functions of the control toolbar as "ICCAxCollection" type. |
| [MoveToFirst](#movetofirst-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "First line" button function of the control. |
| [MoveToLast](#movetolast-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Last data record" button function of the control. |
| [MoveToNext](#movetonext-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Next data record" button function of the control. |
| [MoveToPrevious](#movetoprevious-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Previous data record" button function of the control. |
| [PasteRows](#pasterows-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Insert rows" button function of the recipe view. |
| [Print](#print-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Print" button function of the control. |
| [ReadTags](#readtags-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Read tags" button function of the recipe view. |
| [SelectAll](#selectall-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Selects all rows in a table-based control. |
| [SelectRow](#selectrow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Selects a specific row in a table-based control. |
| [ServerExport](#serverexport-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Export log" button function of the recipe view. |
| [ServerImport](#serverimport-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Import log" button function of the recipe view. |
| [ShowHelp](#showhelp-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Help" button function of the control. |
| [ShowPropertyDialog](#showpropertydialog-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Configuration dialog" button function of the control. |
| [ShowSelectArchive](#showselectarchive-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Select data connection" button function of the recipe view. |
| [ShowSelection](#showselection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Selection dialog" button function of the recipe view. |
| [ShowSelectTimeBase](#showselecttimebase-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Timebase dialog" button function of the recipe view. |
| [ShowSort](#showsort-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Sorting dialog" button function of the recipe view. |
| [UnselectAll](#unselectall-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Removes all selections from the cells of a table-based control. |
| [UnselectRow](#unselectrow-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Removes the selections from a specific cell of a table-based control. |
| [WriteTags](#writetags-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Executes the "Write tags" button function of the recipe view. |

#### WindowSlider (Panels, Comfort Panels, RT Advanced, RT Professional)

##### Description

![Description](images/36126536203_DV_resource.Stream@PNG-de-DE.png)

Represents the "Window slider" object. The WindowSlider object is an element of the ScreenItems list.

##### Type identifier in VBS

HMIWindowSlider

| Abbreviation | Access in Runtime |
| --- | --- |
| R | Read |
| RW | Read and write |
| - | No access |

Properties

| Properties | RT Professional | RT Advanced | Panel RT | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| AllTagTypesAllowed | - | - | - | - |
| [AskOperationMotive](#askoperationmotive-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the reason for operating this object is logged. |
| [Authorization](#authorization-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies operating rights. |
| [BackColor](#backcolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the background color. |
| [BackColorBottom](#backcolorbottom-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color for the lower / right part of the object. |
| [BackColorTop](#backcolortop-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color for the upper / left part of the object. |
| [BackFillStyle](#backfillstyle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the fill pattern. |
| [BackFlashingColorOff](#backflashingcoloroff-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the background color for flash state "Off". |
| [BackFlashingColorOn](#backflashingcoloron-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the background color for flash state "On". |
| [BackFlashingEnabled](#backflashingenabled-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the background flashes in runtime. |
| [BackFlashingRate](#backflashingrate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the flash rate of the background. |
| [BorderBackColor](#borderbackcolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the background color of the broken border line. |
| [BorderColor](#bordercolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the line color. |
| [BorderFlashingColorOff](#borderflashingcoloroff-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the border line for the flashing status "Off". |
| [BorderFlashingColorOn](#borderflashingcoloron-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the border line for the flashing status "On". |
| BorderFlashingEnabled | - | - | - | - |
| [BorderFlashingRate](#borderflashingrate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the flash rate of the border line. |
| [BorderStyle](#borderstyle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the type of border lines. |
| [BorderWidth](#borderwidth-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the line thickness. |
| Bounds | - | - | - | - |
| CanBeGrouped | - | - | - | - |
| [CornerStyle](#cornerstyle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the shape of the corners. |
| [DrawInsideFrame](#drawinsideframe-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the border line is to be shown with a line thickness of greater than 1 within the border or symmetrically to the border. |
| [EdgeStyle](#edgestyle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the line style. |
| [Enabled](#enabled-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the selected object can be operated in runtime. |
| [FillingDirection](#fillingdirection-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the fill direction. |
| [FillPatternColor](#fillpatterncolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the fill pattern. |
| Flashing | - | - | - | - |
| [Height](#height-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the height. |
| [HighLimitColor](#highlimitcolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the top or right scroll button in a scroll bar. |
| [JumpToLimitsAfterMouseClick](#jumptolimitsaftermouseclick-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether the slider is set to the associated end value. |
| [Layer](#layer-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the layer in the screen that contains an object. |
| [Left](#left-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the value of the X coordinate. |
| [LineEndShapeStyle](#lineendshapestyle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the shape of the line ends. |
| Location | - | - | - | - |
| [LogOperation](#logoperation-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies whether, after operating this object, an alarm is output to the alarm system. |
| [LowLimitColor](#lowlimitcolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the color of the bottom or left scroll button in a scroll bar. |
| [MarginToBorder](#margintoborder-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the width of the 3D border in pixels. |
| [MaximumValue](#maximumvalue-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the maximum value of the scale in the selected object. |
| [MinimumValue](#minimumvalue-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | RW | - | - | Specifies the minimum value of the scale in the selected object. |
| Name | - | - | - | - |
| [OperationSteps](#operationsteps-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the number of steps by which the slider of the scrollbar is moved with one mouse click. |
| [ProcessValue](#processvalue-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the default for the value to be displayed. |
| [RelativeFillLevel](#relativefilllevel-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the percentage to which the object is filled. |
| [ShowBadTagState](#showbadtagstate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the object is grayed out in the event of a bad quality code or tag status. |
| [ShowFillLevel](#showfilllevel-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the specified object is filled. |
| Size | - | - | - | - |
| [StyleSettings](#stylesettings-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the style in which the object is displayed. |
| TabIndex | - | - | - | - |
| TabIndexAlpha | - | - | - | - |
| [TextOrientation](#textorientation-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the text orientation. |
| [ThumbBackColor](#thumbbackcolor-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the background color of the slider. |
| [ToolTipText](#tooltiptext-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the tooltip text. |
| [Top](#top-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the value of the Y coordinate. |
| [Transparency](#transparency-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the object transparency in percent. |
| [UseDesignColorSchema](#usedesigncolorschema-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the colors defined in the global color scheme of the current design are used for this object. |
| [UseDesignShadowSettings](#usedesignshadowsettings-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the object is displayed with global shading. |
| [Visible](#visible-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the specified object is visible. |
| [Width](#width-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns the width of the object in pixels. |
| [WindowsStyle](#windowsstyle-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | R | - | - | Returns whether the object is displayed in the general Windows style. |

Methods

| Methods | RT Professional | RT Advanced | Panel RT | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Activate](#activate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Enables the permanent area or the root screen. |
| [ActivateDynamic](#activatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Dynamically activates a trigger and the specified cycle for a property at runtime. |
| [DeactivateDynamic](#deactivatedynamic-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | Yes | - | - | Deactivates the trigger of the "ActivateDynamic" method used for the specified property in/during runtime. |

| [Visible](#visible-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | - | - | RW | Specifies whether the selected object is visible. |
| Width | - | R | R | Specifies the width. |

Methods

| Methods | RT Professional | RT Advanced | Panel RT | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Activate](#activate-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | - | - | Yes | Enables the permanent area or the root screen. |

![Description](images/36126536203_DV_resource.Stream@PNG-de-DE.png)

| Abbreviation | Access in runtime |
| --- | --- |
| R | Read |
| RW | Read and write |
| - | No access |

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| AllTagTypesAllowed | - | - | - | - |
| Bounds | - | - | - | - |
| CanBeGrouped | - | - | - | - |
| Height | - | R | R | Specifies the height. |
| [Layer](#layer-rt-professional) | - | - | RW | Specifies the layer in the screen that contains an object. |
| [Left](#left-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | - | - | RW | Specifies the value of the X coordinate. |
| Location | - | - | - | - |
| Name | - | - | - | - |
| Size | - | - | - | - |
| TabIndex | - | - | - | - |
| TabIndexAlpha | - | - | - | - |
| [Top](#top-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | - | - | RW | Specifies the value of the Y coordinate. |
| [Visible](#visible-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional) | - | - | RW | Specifies whether the selected object is visible. |
| Width | - | R | R | Specifies the width. |

Methods

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |

#### AboveUpperLimitColor (Panels, Comfort Panels, RT Advanced, RT Professional)

##### Description

Specifies the color when the high limit is exceeded.

Access in runtime

- RT Advanced: No access
- RT Professional: Read and write

##### Syntax

Object.**AboveUpperLimitColor**[=Color]

**Object**

Required. An object of the type "ScreenItem" with the following format:

- IOField

You have no access in runtime with the following format:

- GraphicIOField
- Switch
- SymbolLibrary
- SymbolicIOField

**Color**

Optional. A value or a constant that specifies the color for the "High limit violated" case.

##### Comments

You use the "RGB" function to specify the color in RGB format (red, green, blue). To do this, enter the appropriate decimal value for each of the three RGB values (range from 0 to 255). For example, the color "red" is shown like this:

RGB (255, 0, 0)

You can also use the VBS color constants such as `vbRed` and `vbGreen`.

---

**See also**

[IOField (Panels, Comfort Panels, RT Advanced, RT Professional)](#iofield-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional)
  
[GraphicIOField (Panels, Comfort Panels, RT Advanced, RT Professional)](#graphiciofield-panels-comfort-panels-rt-advanced-rt-professional)

#### AcceptOnExit (Panels, Comfort Panels, RT Advanced, RT Professional)

##### Description

Specifies whether the input field will be confirmed automatically when it is left.

Access in runtime: Read and write

##### Syntax

Object.**AcceptOnExit**[=BOOLEAN]

**Object**

Required. A "ScreenItem" object with the following format:

- IOField
- SymbolicIOField

**BOOLEAN**

Optional TRUE, if the input field will be confirmed automatically when it is left.

#### AcceptOnFull (Panels, Comfort Panels, RT Advanced, RT Professional)

##### Description

Specifies whether the input field will be left and confirmed automatically when the set number of values have been entered.

Access in runtime: Read and write

##### Syntax

Object.**AcceptOnFull**[=BOOLEAN]

**Object**

Required. A "ScreenItem" object with the following format:

- IOField

**BOOLEAN**

Optional TRUE, if the input field will be left and confirmed automatically when the set number of values have been entered.
